body.value:
@concat( '{', '"email":"', item().email_id, '",', '"subject":"', pipeline().parameters.Subject, '",', '"body":"', 'Hi ', item().name, ',

', 'I hope you''re doing well.

', 'I came across your profile while exploring opportunities at ', item().company_name, ' and wanted to reach out regarding any Data Engineer openings within your team.

', 'I am currently working as a Data Engineer at SmartRecon Technologies, where I design and build scalable data platforms using Azure Data Factory, Databricks, PySpark, SQL, Delta Lake, and Azure Data Lake. My experience includes developing large-scale ETL/ELT pipelines processing millions of daily records, implementing metadata-driven frameworks, optimizing distributed data workloads, and supporting enterprise-grade financial reporting systems.

', 'Some highlights of my experience include:
', '• Processing 4–5 million daily transactional records through production-grade data pipelines.
', '• Building metadata-driven ingestion frameworks that significantly reduced manual effort.
', '• Improving Delta Lake query performance through optimization techniques such as Z-Ordering and file compaction.
', '• Working with Data Warehousing, Dimensional Modeling, and real-time streaming architectures.

', 'Additionally, I have solved 650+ LeetCode problems, achieved a 1950 rating (Top 3% globally), and maintain a strong focus on problem-solving and system design.

', 'I am currently an Immediate Joiner and actively looking for my next opportunity. If there are any relevant openings within your team, I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to connect and discuss how I can contribute.

', 'Thank you for your time and consideration.

', 'Best Regards,
', 'Pratyush Sahoo

', 'Phone: +91-9556102777
', 'Email: pratyush.sahoo2k26@gmail.com
', 'LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pratyush-sahoo-a3a360243/
', 'Resume: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1q95LymUAgfV5gJCjvcW9i32HicyLC9F2/view
', 'LeetCode: https://leetcode.com/u/PratTheCode/
', 'Notice Period: Immediate Joiner', '"', '}' )

Subject.defaultValue: Data Engineer | 2.5+ Years Experience | Immediate Joiner
